question_en: The objective of 'Mission Indradhanush' launched in the year 2014 is:
question_hi: वर्ष 2014 में प्रारंभ हुए ‘अभियान इंद्रधनुष’ का उद्देश्य है :
options_en: To provide information, commodities and services to meet the diverse needs of adolescents.
To cover children who are partially vaccinated or unvaccinated during routine immunization.
To provide affordable and quality health services to the rural population.
To provide education to underprivileged children.
options_hi: किशोरों की विभिन्न प्रकार की आवश्यकताओं की पूर्ति हेतु जानकारी, वस्तुएँ तथा सेवाएँ प्रदान करना ।
नियमित टीकाकरण के समय पर अधूरे टीकाकरण अथवा टीकाकरण रहित छूट गए बच्चों को सम्मिलित करना ।
ग्रामीण जनसंख्या को किफायती तथा गुणवत्तापूर्ण स्वास्थ्य सेवाएँ प्रदान करना ।
वंचित बच्चों को शिक्षा प्रदान करना।
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Mission Indradhanush was launched to ensure full immunization with all available vaccines for children up to two years of age and pregnant women.
fingerprint: the objective of mission indradhanush launched in the year 2014 is

question_en: What is the full form of the MAA program?

question_en: A boy is standing at a distance of fifty centimeters from a plane mirror. What will be the distance between the mirror and the image?

subject: general-science
explanation: In a plane mirror, the image is formed at the same distance behind the mirror as the object is in front of it. So the mirror-to-image distance is 50 cm.
